summary: Iteration 109: Tested Bank Account Auto-calculation and Sales Form Changes. All 13 backend tests passed. All 7 frontend UI tests passed. Key changes verified: 1) Bank account dropdown REMOVED from Sales form 2) Dashboard Bank Account Summary widget shows auto-calculated Received/Paid Out/Net Balance per account 3) 'All Banks Total' summary bar shows aggregated totals 4) 'View Details' button opens Branch Dues drill-down dialog 5) Bank Accounts page CRUD works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Existing test bank account: Al Rajhi - Main (account_number: 1234567890, is_default: true, branch: All Branches). Auto-calculated values: In: SAR 26,099.90, Out: SAR 34,633.00, Net: SAR -8,533.10 (11 bank sales).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key iteration 109 changes: 1) Sales form NO LONGER has bank_account_id dropdown - bank totals are auto-calculated based on branch-bank assignment. 2) Dashboard has 'Bank Account Summary' widget (data-testid='bank-account-summary') showing each bank account's Received (green), Paid Out (red), Net Balance. 3) 'Manage Accounts' button (data-testid='manage-bank-accounts-btn') navigates to /bank-accounts. 4) Branch Dues section has 'View Details' button (data-testid='view-dues-detail-btn') opening dues detail dialog (data-testid='dues-detail-dialog'). 5) GET /api/bank-accounts/summary endpoint returns auto-calculated totals per account with fields: id, name, bank_name, account_number, assigned_branch, is_default, incoming, outgoing, net, sales_count.

1_sales_form_no_bank_dropdown.details: Sales form correctly does NOT have bank_account_id dropdown (data-testid='sale-bank-account-select'). Bank totals are auto-calculated based on branch-bank assignment.

2_dashboard_bank_summary_widget.details: Dashboard shows 'Bank Account Summary' widget (data-testid='bank-account-summary') with bank account cards showing Name, Branch, Received (green), Paid Out (red), Net Balance.

3_bank_summary_totals_bar.details: 'All Banks Total' summary bar shows aggregated In/Out/Net totals: In: SAR 26,099.90, Out: SAR 34,633.00, Net: SAR -8,533.10

4_manage_accounts_button.details: 'Manage Accounts' button (data-testid='manage-bank-accounts-btn') in Bank Summary widget navigates to /bank-accounts page.

5_backend_bank_accounts_summary.details: GET /api/bank-accounts/summary returns {accounts: [...], total_bank_incoming, total_bank_outgoing, total_bank_net}. Each account has: id, name, bank_name, account_number, assigned_branch, is_default, incoming, outgoing, net, sales_count.

6_view_dues_detail_button.details: Dashboard 'Branch-to-Branch Dues' section has 'View Details' button (data-testid='view-dues-detail-btn').

7_dues_detail_dialog.details: Clicking 'View Details' opens dues detail dialog (data-testid='dues-detail-dialog') showing cross-branch transactions with columns: Date, Type, From Branch, To Branch, Amount, Description. Shows 2 transactions (Transfer, Supplier Payment).

8_backend_branch_dues_detail.details: GET /api/reports/branch-dues-detail returns {entries: [...], total: N} with cross-branch transaction details.

9_bank_accounts_page_crud.details: Bank Accounts page (/bank-accounts) loads correctly. CRUD operations work: Create, Read, Update, Delete all pass. Add Bank Account dialog has all required fields.
